---
title: "Resources"
---

## What Lives Here

This section points attendees and instructors to the reusable assets behind the course.

:::: {.resource-grid}
::: {.resource-card}
### Quarto references

Curated notes on websites, Revealjs, code highlighting, and GitHub Pages live in `.github/quarto-docs/`.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
### Public data options

The exercise datasets live under `data/` and `attendee-assets/knowledge-sources/`.
:::

::: {.resource-card}
### Starter servers

Python MCP examples and templates live under `mcp-servers/`.
:::
::::

## External References

- [Quarto website docs](https://quarto.org/docs/websites/)
- [Quarto Revealjs docs](https://quarto.org/docs/presentations/revealjs/)
- [Model Context Protocol](https://modelcontextprotocol.io/)
- [uv documentation](https://docs.astral.sh/uv/)
